message:
chore: add .codex-target-arc/ to .gitignore

Prevent codex agent build artifacts from being committed to git.
These are large binary files (up to 453MB) that block GitHub pushes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -238,3 +238,4 @@ tmp_rch_probe/
 # Session extension binary test artifacts
 __CHANGESET__
 __PATCHSET__
+.codex-target-arc/
